name: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Limited
summary: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Limited manufactures and supplies egg products in India, Japan, Russia, Europe, and internationally. The company offers various egg powders, including whole egg powder for use in biscuits, cakes, bakery mixes, pasta, sauces, dressings, ready meals, quiches, omelets, mayonnaise, meat products, and other emulsified systems; egg yolk powder for use in mayonnaises, dressings, sauces, Spanish bread, croissants, pasta, and ice-cream; and egg albumen powder for use in bakery, pastry, confectionary, and meat and fish products. It also provides bakery mix products for use in cheese cakes, biscuits, cakes, sponge cakes, Swiss rolls, etc.; and liquid eggs comprising whole egg liquids, egg yolk liquids, egg albumen liquids, and customized egg liquids for use in cakes, meringues, noodles, mayonnaise, bakeries, fine food, ice-creams, cosmetics, confectionery, and pastries. In addition, the company trades in feed ingredients. SKM Egg Products Export (India) Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Erode, India.
